So when we have our GDM weekly next week, two weeks later, we can circle back on that, yeah?
Yeah, okay.
Perfect, perfect.
So I think that covers pretty much all of it.
One more thing, Jason, for just the last thing, I was going to touch on it.
Yeah, no, I think that's pretty much it.
Something is eating at the back of my mind, but I cannot recall.
I'll just tell you what think.
But, yeah, that's it.
I hope you enjoy your trip to China.
Shanghai, very amazing place.
Skyscrapers and everything.

Yeah, I can't wait.
All right, well, I'll chat with you soon, then.

All right, Jason, see you.

Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) and its relationship with SEO, along with challenges in measuring GEO effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GEO is not replacing SEO but is an additional channel to optimize for as AI-driven traffic increases](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Measuring GEO effectiveness is challenging due to lack of analytics and personalized AI responses](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Content creation remains crucial, but the way it's consumed and who searches for it is shifting towards AI](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)

## Topics

### GEO vs SEO Relationship

  - [GEO is not a replacement for SEO but an additional channel to optimize](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Traffic from LLMs (Large Language Models) has grown from 0% to 5-30% for many sites](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Some content categories (e.g., informational queries) are being disrupted by AI responses](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Product-related searches still drive significant traffic and remain relevant for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

### Challenges in Measuring GEO Effectiveness

  - [Lack of analytics from AI models and tools](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [Difficulty in tracking actual usage and prompts](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Personalization in AI responses makes tracking complex](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Attribution breaks as there's often no direct link from AI responses to websites](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Resource-intensive to track diverse user contexts and needs](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

### Content Creation and Distribution

  - [Content remains crucial for telling product stories and spreading information](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [The consumption method is shifting, with more content being accessed through AI interfaces](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Good content still attracts people, but distribution channels are evolving](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

### Future of GEO and AI in Marketing

  - [Potential for AI platforms to introduce monetization (e.g., ads) which could lead to more analytics](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Information might shift to more closed, personal environments (e.g., private communities)](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Rapid changes in AI capabilities could quickly alter the landscape](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)

### Industries Benefiting from GEO

  - [Difficult to pinpoint specific industries due to rapid changes in AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
  - [Recommendation to invest in GEO across all product categories as AI is becoming ubiquitous](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to review scheduled posts in Assembly when time permits](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
  - [Rafid to organize brand style guides and post examples for each person he's writing for into Notion](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
  - [Rafid to share the organized artifacts with Bianca](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Discuss the organized artifacts and potential workflow improvements in the next GDM weekly meeting](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
  - [Continue experimenting with content direction for various team members (Kyle, Jacob, Dave)](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
  - [Rafid to have ideation calls with Jacob and Kyle next week](https://fathom.video/share/tw1yZhR6rzmWCh-87zg2ysnXjMkrEdz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2036.0)
